title: Conciliation agreements; violation unlawful
doc_html:
§2258.  Conciliation agreements; violation unlawful

It is an unlawful practice for a party to a conciliation agreement made pursuant to R.S. 51:2257(D) to violate the terms of the agreement.

Acts 1988, No. 886, §1.
doc_text:
§2258.  Conciliation agreements; violation unlawful
It is an unlawful practice for a party to a conciliation agreement made pursuant to R.S. 51:2257(D) to violate the terms of the agreement.
Acts 1988, No. 886, §1.
